Title: Krönig, Wolfgang
Overview: Medievalist; wrote one of the volumes in the series on the Duomo of Monreale, following the volumes by Ernst Kitzinger on the mosaics in the Cathedral and that by Roberto Salvini on the capitals in the Cloister.
Selected Bibliography: The Cathedral of Monreale and Norman Architecture in Sicily. Palermo: S.F. Flaccovio, 1966.
